Requires iOS 18.0 or later."},{"url":"https://www.digitalapplied.com/blog/perplexity-comet-ai-native-iphone-browser-research-guide","title":"Perplexity Comet: AI-Native iPhone Browser Research Guide","content":"Comet is the first major AI-native browser purpose-built for iPhone: Launched March 18, 2026, Perplexity Comet integrates a research assistant at the browser level rather than as an extension or overlay.
On March 18, 2026, Perplexity launched Comet, an AI-native browser for iPhone that repositions the company from a search alternative into a platform.
Rather than competing within Safari or Chrome as extensions, Perplexity is betting that owning the browser gives it the contextual access needed to build the persistent AI assistant that standalone apps cannot replicate.
The browser completes the navigation and form filling but presents the user with a confirmation step before taking irreversible actions like submitting bookings or purchases.
Comet is available as a free download from the App Store.
New users who are familiar with the Perplexity app will find the research assistant familiar, while the autonomous task mode is presented through guided examples that demonstrate its scope.

Comet is an AI-powered browser that acts as a personal assistant and thinking partner. · Enjoy the web and let the AI assistant handle your chores · Do everything on your to-do list faster with Comet · Comet adapts to how you think and work, learning your habits to keep you organized. I use it both at work (healthcare/IT and operations) and at home, and it has already replaced a bunch of tools I used to juggle.Instead of bouncing between a traditional browser, an AI chatbot, and my notes, I can stay in one place and let Comet do the tab wrangling and research for me. It is fantastic for deep dives where I have lots of sources open: I can have the assistant summarize pages, compare vendors, pull out key details from documentation, or draft messages and policies based on what I am looking at, all inside the browser.On iOS, it is exactly what I wanted: the same intelligence I have on my Mac, now in my pocket.","score":0.51662046,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.45,"request_id":"b05a025e-08bf-48d0-943a-d937a45f60b9"}
